privileged_info_summary: The task 'add_preventive_action@1' is hosted in an Odoo 17 environment (odoo_quality_env@0.1) accessible at http://localhost:8069 with admin credentials (admin/admin). The target data is a synthetic quality alert titled 'Material Hardness Below Specification' created programmatically in setup_data.py, describing a material hardness defect at 12% below specification threshold for Lot A-2024-112 from Acoustic Bloc Screens product. The alert has corrective action already filled ('Affected batch quarantined and supplier notified.') but the preventive action field is empty, requiring the agent to enter specific quality management guidance text about implementing incoming material hardness testing, requiring Brinell hardness certificates from suppliers, and establishing automated rejection criteria in ERP. The task has a 240-second timeout and 30-step maximum. The verifier is a stub that always returns True with score 100 for external VLM evaluation.
